query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, duration, lessonOrder, videoUrl, isPublished, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (1, 'Discipleship Principles', '

Introduction to Discipleship

Discipleship is the process of helping others grow in their faith and become mature followers of Christ. In this lesson, you will learn the biblical foundations of discipleship and practical strategies for mentoring others.

Key Topics

  • The Great Commission and Jesus\' model of discipleship
  • Characteristics of an effective disciple-maker
  • Building intentional relationships for spiritual growth
  • Creating a discipleship plan
  • Overcoming common challenges in discipleship

Biblical Foundation

Matthew 28:19-20 - "Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you."

2 Timothy 2:2 - "And the things you have heard me say in the presence of many witnesses entrust to reliable people who will also be qualified to teach others."

Practical Application

Discipleship is not just about teaching information, but about life transformation. Effective discipleship involves:

  • Modeling Christ-like character
  • Teaching biblical truth
  • Providing accountability and encouragement
  • Empowering others to disciple the next generation
', '45 minutes', 11, NULL, TRUE, NOW(), NOW()), (1, 'Sharing Your Faith', '

Introduction to Evangelism

Every believer is called to share the good news of Jesus Christ with others. This lesson will equip you with the confidence and practical skills to effectively communicate the gospel in everyday conversations.

Key Topics

  • Understanding the gospel message
  • Overcoming fear and objections
  • Building bridges through relationships
  • Sharing your personal testimony
  • Responding to common questions about Christianity
  • Following up with new believers

Biblical Foundation

Romans 1:16 - "For I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God that brings salvation to everyone who believes."

1 Peter 3:15 - "But in your hearts revere Christ as Lord. Always be prepared to give an answer to everyone who asks you to give the reason for the hope that you have. But do this with gentleness and respect."

Practical Application

Effective evangelism involves:

  • Living an authentic Christian life
  • Listening to others\' stories and needs
  • Sharing your personal testimony
  • Clearly explaining the gospel
  • Inviting people to respond to Christ
  • Connecting new believers with a church community

Your Personal Testimony

A powerful tool for sharing your faith is your personal story of how you came to know Christ. Structure your testimony in three parts:

  1. Your life before Christ
  2. How you came to faith in Jesus
  3. How your life has changed since following Christ
', '50 minutes', 12, NULL, TRUE, NOW(), NOW());
